form.formComment: Comes off a 30 day let-up. Last run pulled up at Cheltenham in the G1 Stayers Hurdle on March 12 over 4800m. Race before made some head-way from midfield; finished third in a small field at Cheltenham in the G2 Cleeve Hurdle on January 24 over 4800m, slow track; 11 len behind Ma Shantou carrying 72.5kg at $11. Hard to trust and looking elsewhere.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign 9 of 11 runners at Clonmel September 11 over 3319m, slow track; 14 len behind Shoda with 56.5kg at $7.50. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 5.5 len win. Kilbeggan April 25 over 4526m defeating Killaney King carrying 75.5kg at $5.50. Not today in this company.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after four months finished seventh of 10 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Stayers Hurdle on March 12 over 4800m, 10 len behind Home By The Lee with 74.5kg at $51. Previously second-up got back early finished fourth in a small field at Wetherby in the G2 Charlie Hall Chase on November 1 over 4800m, 28 len behind Djelo with 71.5kg at $3. Not without a place chance on his best form.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Freshened for 62 days. Fresh up after 10 months finished fifth in a small field at Navan in the G2 Boyne Hurdle on February 8 over 4425m, on a wet track; 43 len behind Staffordshire Knot with 75.5kg at $8.50. Previously second-up finished ninth of 11 runners at Punchestown in the G1 Champion Stayers Hurdle on May 1 over 4727m, 38 len behind Teahupoo carrying 74.5kg at $8. Leading contender and not ruled out.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Comes off a 30 day let-up. Last start won by 1.3 len Cheltenham in a G1 Stayers Hurdle on March 12 over 4800m defeating Ballyburn with 74.5kg at $34 in a jumps. Before that won by 0.5 len Gowran Park in a G2 Galmoy Hurdle on January 22 over 4727m in the wet defeating Staffordshire Knot with 75.5kg at $4 in a jumps. Hard to fault whilst in this good vain of form.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last outing finished fifth of 10 runners at Cheltenham in the G1 Stayers Hurdle on March 12 over 4800m, 6 len behind Home By The Lee with 74.5kg at $12. At only start last preparation sat on the speed and boxed on steadily finished third of 11 starters at Ascot in the G1 Long Walk Hurdle on December 20 over 4900m, 1.5 len behind Impose Toi carrying 73kg at $3.80. Can improve on first up performance. The one to beat back here

form.formComment: Freshened for 30 days. Last outing pulled up at Cheltenham in the G1 Stayers Hurdle on March 12 over 4800m. Run before finished second in a small field at Cheltenham in the G2 Cleeve Hurdle on January 24 over 4800m, on slow going 7 len behind Ma Shantou carrying 73.5kg at $2. Go close. Well worth another chance.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after two months favourite; won by 6 len Cheltenham on March 11 over 4200m defeating Franciscan Rock carrying 71kg at $5.50 in a hurdle. Previously second-up finished second in a small field at Cheltenham in the G2 Relkeel Hurdle on January 1 over 4100m, 5.5 len behind Kabral Du Mathan carrying 70kg at $6. Well worth his place at this level.

form.formComment: Resuming after three months. Finished off last campaign when last in a small field at Cheltenham in the G2 Cleeve Hurdle January 24 over 4800m, slow track; 44 len behind Ma Shantou with 73.5kg at $5.50. Previous preparation first-up won by a neck Wetherby G2 West Yorkshire Hurdle November 1 over 4800m defeating Take No Chances carrying 73.5kg at $2.90. Respected back on a flat track.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after three months won by 2.75 len Cheltenham on March 13 over 4100m on rain affected going defeating Hot Fuss with 74.5kg at $11 in a hurdle. Previously second-up finished 13th of 16 runners at Leopardstown in the LR on December 29 over 4123m, 36 len behind Champagne Kid with 73.5kg at $7. Definite chance. Has to be considered with the yard back in form.

This requires a personal best.

form.formComment: Freshened for 30 days. Last run finished fourth of 7 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 David Nicholson Mares Hurdle on March 12 over 4100m, 16 len behind Wodhooh with 72kg at $13. Race before made some head-way from midfield; finished third in a small field at Windsor on January 16 over 4000m, slow track; 1.5 len behind Potters Charm carrying 70.5kg at $4.50. Unlikely she'll be good enough but place claims at best.
